Public Remarks: Beautiful 2.3-acre parcel with 200 feet of direct creek frontage and river access. Zoned Agricultural-Commercial. No deed restrictions. Utilities available at road. Great opportunity for residential development or recreational use. Seller to provide survey.
Directions: From US-301 heading north, turn left on Riverside Road, property is approximately 1.2 miles on the right. Look for survey stakes.
